Willow's arrival and departure times have been much more consistent, which has been great!  She is such a polite and lovely young woman, and beautiful with our children.

Hi Katie,

 

Thanks for your email, and I’m pretty sure that I gave an emailed feedback the last time.

We try to get the children organised to be ready for the activity before 9:30am, but this does not seem to matter as your teacher is late.

patterns.prevention:
• **Audit** coach engagement levels at all active centres within 2 weeks—assess energy, attendance consistency, and participant feedback to identify at-risk placements.

• **Establish** a backup coach protocol so centres never lose programming due to staff absence; assign secondary coaches to high-value accounts immediately.

• **Schedule** monthly check-ins with centre managers to catch satisfaction issues early, specifically asking about coach quality and program difficulty.

• **Review** coach onboarding and training to ensure new/junior coaches meet engagement standards before being assigned to centres; consider pairing weaker coaches with strong mentors.

By April 2026, the program had fully stabilised and was operating at a consistently high level, with explicit feedback confirming that Mateus was engaging well with children and delivering sessions that were both enjoyable and well-received. centres.closedDesc:
Reason for finishing: Have been told by management to stop all incursions, have also been forced stop their music incursions as well, will be doing them in house. Received similar feedback from other FEL

Started: 4th of Feb
Sessions Completed: 11
Sessions Missed: 1
Rescheduled: 3

Coaches:
Marcel (8 Sessions)
Zac (1)
Matthew (1)
Dave (1)

Summary of their time with us:
After a rough start due to a couple early reschedules and not loving coach Zac, feedback was only positive with marcel locked in as their preferred coach. Happy with Dave and Matthew when they were required to fill in again. 

Next point of contact:
Calling late 2026 hoping FEL changes their no incursion stance.
